definitions: 大陆 (指地球上的主要陆地板块)

examples.text: Africa only represents 2% of global greenhouse-gas emissions but it is the continent that is expected to suffer the most from climate impacts,
examples.explanation: 非洲仅占全球温室气体排放量的2%，但它却是预计将遭受气候变化影响最严重的大陆。

reviewSessions.example_text: Africa only represents 2% of global greenhouse-gas emissions but it is the continent that is expected to suffer the most from climate impacts,
expected_definitions: 大陆 (指地球上的主要陆地板块)
reviewSessions.feedback: 准确。“continent”可译为“大洲/大陆”，在例句中指非洲这个洲。
matched_points: 符合例句中非洲作为一个洲的用法
